title: dianthus hypoleucus
intro: Dianthus hypoleucus, also known as the fringed pink or pink fringed pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Dianthus hypoleucus include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Dianthus hypoleucus include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are typically made by steeping the dried flowers or roots in hot water.
